mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(COM_CD) AS COM_CD, COM_CD_NM FROM COM_CD WHERE TRIM(CL_CODE) = #{clCode} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY COM_CD

SELECT TRIM(C.CL_CODE) AS CL_CODE, TRIM(C.CL_CD_NM) AS CL_CD_NM, C.CL_CD_EXPLN, C.USE_YN, C.RGTR_ID, C.LAST_MDFR_ID, TO_CHAR(C.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DT, TO_CHAR(C.MDFCN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MDFCN_DT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COM_CD D WHERE TRIM(D.CL_CODE) = TRIM(C.CL_CODE)) AS CODE_COUNT FROM COM_CL C ORDER BY C.CL_CODE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COM_CL (CL_CODE, CL_CD_NM, CL_CD_EXPLN, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{clCode}, #{clCdNm}, #{clCdExpln}, NVL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), #{rgtrId}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE COM_CL SET CL_CD_NM = #{clCdNm}, CL_CD_EXPLN = #{clCdExpln}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE TRIM(CL_CODE) = #{clCode}
mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(COM_CD) AS COM_CD, TRIM(CL_CODE) AS CL_CODE, COM_CD_NM, COM_CD_EXPLN, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DT, TO_CHAR(MDFCN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MDFCN_DT FROM COM_CD WHERE TRIM(CL_CODE) = #{clCode} ORDER BY COM_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COM_CD (COM_CD, CL_CODE, COM_CD_NM, COM_CD_EXPLN, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{comCd}, #{clCode}, #{comCdNm}, #{comCdExpln}, NVL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), #{rgtrId}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE COM_CD SET COM_CD_NM = #{comCdNm}, COM_CD_EXPLN = #{comCdExpln}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE TRIM(COM_CD) = #{comCd} AND TRIM(CL_CODE) = #{clCode}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM COM_CD WHERE TRIM(COM_CD) = #{comCd} AND TRIM(CL_CODE) = #{clCode}
